key.description: The secret. Handed back in full so it can be copied.

display.description: Masked secret, safe to show in a list.

timeUsed.description: When the key last authenticated a request.

expiresAt.description: When the key stops working. Null means it never expires.

current.description: Whether this is the key authenticating the current request.

get.description: Get the profile of the currently authenticated user.
List the current user's API keys. The key authenticating this request is flagged `current`.

post.description: Mint a named API key for the current user. Pass `expiresInDays` to set an expiry; omit it for a key that never expires.

200.description: The created key, including its secret.

delete.description: Revoke an API key. The secret stops authenticating immediately.
